title: The Power Rangers will appear in Evangelion 333
display_title: The Power Rangers will appear in Evangelion 333
wikitext:
[]: The Power Rangers will appear in Evangelion 3.33... Post by qu4d » Mon Apr 09, 2012 4:35 am ...to fight Lord Zedd. Eva 06 = Lord Zedd Horn and visor gave it away - discuss!

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 09, 2012 4:46 am We already figured some of that out Asuka: Halt! Her suit color is the crimson of Justice! Representing effort and hardiness, Second Red! Her suit color is as blank as her brain, mute and stagnant, First White! Asuka: His suit color is the blue of depression! A hard-core baka, the antisocial Third Blue! Asuka: His suit color is the green of his Kansai accent. A hot-headed epicure, Fourth Green! Asuka: His suit color is the black of passive-aggressiveness, narcissistic to the core, Fifth Black!

[]: Post by Ceimoa Nan » Mon Apr 09, 2012 2:20 pm You're a big fan of After the End, aren't you Mr. Tines?

[]: Post by Azathoth » Mon Apr 09, 2012 4:17 pm In light of Rebuild, it's kind of hard not to be.

[]: Post by NemZ » Mon Apr 09, 2012 11:12 pm It comes with the job.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 10, 2012 12:01 am Unfortunately, so does this...

Article: The Power Rangers will appear in Evangelion 333
[]: The Power Rangers will appear in Evangelion 3.33... Post by qu4d » Mon Apr 09, 2012 4:35 am ...to fight Lord Zedd. Eva 06 = Lord Zedd Horn and visor gave it away - discuss!

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 09, 2012 4:46 am We already figured some of that out Asuka: Halt! Her suit color is the crimson of Justice! Representing effort and hardiness, Second Red! Her suit color is as blank as her brain, mute and stagnant, First White! Asuka: His suit color is the blue of depression! A hard-core baka, the antisocial Third Blue! Asuka: His suit color is the green of his Kansai accent. A hot-headed epicure, Fourth Green! Asuka: His suit color is the black of passive-aggressiveness, narcissistic to the core, Fifth Black!
